testimonials.name: Jean-Louis Gassée
testimonials.title: Be, Inc. founder; former Apple executive

testimonials.name: Paul Brody
testimonials.title: Global Blockchain Leader, EY
testimonials.quote: Farshad turned a federated organization's conflicting demands into a platform that all of EY could actually ship on.

testimonials.name: Ben Bajarin
testimonials.title: Principal Analyst, Creative Strategies
testimonials.quote: There is no one I would rather have direct a hard data story.

testimonials.name: Ryan Singer
testimonials.title: Author, Shape Up; formerly Basecamp
testimonials.quote: Farshad sits with a problem until it has a shape. Then he ships the shape.

testimonials.name: Philip Elmer-DeWitt
testimonials.title: Apple 3.0; formerly Fortune, CNN
testimonials.quote: I have watched Farshad and Horace Dediu turn a quarterly earnings call into a film. It is unnerving how good it is.
